name: CANopenNode
description: Vendored CANopenNode stack (git submodule in vendor/), scoped to the subset needed for this project's minimal bring-up: NMT/Heartbeat, HBconsumer, Emergency, SDOserver, TIME, SYNC, PDO, LEDs, LSSslave, storage. example/ is excluded -- it is a set of templates meant to be copied and adapted (see src/app/canopen/), not compiled in place (main_blank.c defines its own main(), which would collide with Arduino's setup()/loop()).
